text: 2. **`HookCallLog`** (`src/cli/hooks/hook_forensics.rs:10`) — every hook invocation appends JSONL to `<edge_home>/sessions/<session_id>/hook-calls.jsonl` (or `TENEX_EDGE_HOOK_CALL_LOG` override), recording raw stdin, process/parent-chain snapshot, redacted env, and via `context_audit()` (`hook_forensics.rs:67-97`) both the audit JSON above *and* a verbatim `context-injection` note with the exact injected text.
